title: Nia's Garden Friends
synopsis: Nia discovers a magical garden where she makes new friends with the butterflies, flowers, and trees, learning about kindness and caring for nature.

pages.text: Nia loved to explore. One sunny morning, she found a beautiful garden behind the playground. Colorful flowers danced in the breeze, and butterflies fluttered everywhere.

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes standing at the entrance of a magical garden with bright flowers, butterflies, and tall trees in the background

pages.text: "Hello, little flowers," Nia whispered softly. "You're so pretty!" She knelt down to smell the sweet roses and watched a yellow butterfly land on her hand.

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes kneeling beside colorful roses with a yellow butterfly gently resting on her outstretched hand
illustration.alt: Nia greeting flowers with a butterfly on her hand

pages.text: The butterfly seemed to smile at Nia. More butterflies came to visit - blue ones, orange ones, and spotted ones. They danced around her braids, making her giggle with joy.

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes surrounded by colorful butterflies of different colors dancing around her in the sunny garden
illustration.alt: Nia playing with many colorful butterflies

pages.text: "We can be friends!" Nia said happily. A big sunflower nodded in the wind, and the old oak tree rustled its leaves. Even the little ladybugs crawled closer to say hello.

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes talking to a tall sunflower while red ladybugs crawl on nearby leaves and an oak tree sways gently
illustration.alt: Nia making friends with garden plants and insects

pages.text: Nia noticed some flowers looked thirsty. She found a small watering can and gave them cool water. "Friends help each other," she said with a big smile.

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes holding a small watering can, gently watering drooping flowers that perk up with happiness

pages.text: Every day, Nia visited her garden friends. She watered the flowers, talked to the butterflies, and hugged the trees. The garden grew more beautiful because of her love and care.

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes in a thriving garden full of bright blooming flowers, happy butterflies, and lush green trees under a sunny sky
illustration.alt: Nia in her beautiful, thriving garden with all her friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: bright sunny playground, diverse kids playing, primary colors, white space, joyful energetic, inclusive, park swings slides, laughter, friendship activities

questions.question: Where did Nia find the special garden?
questions.explanation: Nia found the beautiful garden behind the playground during her morning exploration.

questions.question: What landed on Nia's hand?
questions.explanation: A friendly yellow butterfly landed on Nia's hand when she was greeting the flowers.

questions.question: How did Nia help her flower friends?
questions.explanation: Nia used a watering can to give the thirsty flowers cool water, showing how friends help each other.

questions.question: What made the garden grow more beautiful?
questions.explanation: The garden became more beautiful because of Nia's daily visits, love, and care for all her garden friends.
